entry.title: Re: Header Freight condition to distribute based on Quant...
entry.content:
Hello, 

I think that in your case the price condition propably is set to calculate on value percentage. Please go to configuration and change the price condition by using only quantity relation: 

 

Hope it will solve your issue. 

Regards, 

Jagoda Drwiega | Senior SAP MM Expert

Email: jagoda.drwiega@vico-finconsulting.vicoland.com

Website: www.vicoland.com/sap

entry.title: Re: Updating hostname of AIX having Netweaver server inst...
entry.content:
Hi 

If you change the hostname, the SAP instance will not start. Could you provide a detailed explanation of the requirement?

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: How to Approve/Reject Task via API in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi Dan,

I am trying to delete all the workflow instances for testing.  

https://spa-api-gateway-bpi-us-prod.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com/public/workflow/rest/v1/workflow-instances/XXXXXXXX-fa3b-4fc3-b1f1-329f2de35a4b as the GET URL and used the Client ID and Client Secret for the Service Key Instance of sap_process_automation.  It gives me an error message as

{
    "error": {
        "code": "bpm.workflowruntime.rest.user.not.sufficient.privileges",
        "message": "User does not have sufficient privileges.",
        "logId": "5ef8d017-35e0-40d7-bc78-70dfe2f-us10"
    }
}
I am the process admin for my sub account and is there anything I am missing to get this executed correctly to get the information about the workflow instance ID thru the API Call.

entry.title: Re: Purchase order price enhancement in S4 hana public cloud
entry.content:
Hello, 

Have you tried this BADI?

MM_PUR_S4_PO_DEFINE_CNDNCTRL

Documentation: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/8676e556cca85267e10000000a441470.html?locale=en-US&q=Price+Determination

Regards,

Jagoda Drwiega | Senior SAP MM Expert

Email: jagoda.drwiega@vico-finconsulting.vicoland.com

Website: www.vicoland.com/sap

entry.title: Re: what the sap basis future
entry.content:
Hi

In my view, we have to learn more about Cloud environments and security systems.

Regards

SS

entry.title: SAP Business Data Cloud (BDC) Integration with SAP Apps and 3rd Party Apps !
entry.content:
Please refer to Blog 1 (Understanding the Technology Behind SAP Business Data Cloud (BDC) - Out of the box 'Insight App") before continuing with this post.

Overview:

SAP Business Data Cloud (BDC) is a fully managed SaaS solution designed to unify and govern all SAP data, while also enabling seamless integration with third-party data. By combining the capabilities of SAP HANA Cloud, SAP Datasphere, and SAP Analytics Cloud, BDC empowers businesses to make real-time, data-driven decisions—supported by secure connectivity and a trusted AI foundation.

I’m excited about BDC and the value it brings. Having experienced firsthand the daily challenges of data transfer from SAP systems to data repositories—such as outdated data, transfer failures, and the lack of end-to-end ownership when issues arise—I understand the critical need for a solution that ensures real-time, up-to-date data availability and especially to leverage AI Insights.

Background:

In Blog 1 (Understanding the Technology Behind SAP Business Data Cloud (BDC) - Out of the box 'Insight App"), I provided an overview of BDC and its business benefits. To help you better understand the underlying technologies and concepts, I’ve broken things down into two key scenarios:

  1. Using “Out-of-the-Box” SAP Insights App with SAP S/4HANA and SAP SuccessFactors as source systems—exploring a step-by-step walkthrough of how the process works.
  2. BDC Integration with SAP Applications, Third-Party Applications, and SAP BW/4HANA Cloud Private Edition.

This blog dives deeper into Scenario 2.

The architecture below provides a detailed summary of how SAP Business Data Cloud (BDC) connects and harmonizes data across SAP and non-SAP applications using a unified data fabric to deliver real-time insights. The key components include data sources, the Business Data Fabric layer, and the consumption layer—enabled through Insight Apps.

Detailed steps:

Step 1: Browse available data products in SAP BDC Cockpit

To extend out-of-the-box Data Products in SAP Business Data Cloud with third-party data, first browse the available Data Products in the SAP Business Data Cloud Cockpit. Select and install the one that best meets your requirements before proceeding with integration.

 

Step 2: Data Product Installation and Transformation Process

When the Data Product installation begins, the bundled business data from your application is accessed, replicated, and processed through various steps within the Foundation Services of SAP Business Data Cloud and transforming it into a ready-to-use Data Product.

Step 3: Data is now available in SAP Datasphere.

Step 4: Integrating Third-Party Data in SAP Datasphere

You can now build the required data model artifacts directly on top of your Data Product in SAP Datasphere. This is where third-party data integration becomes essential. Leveraging SAP Datasphere’s advanced integration and data modeling capabilities, you can seamlessly enrich the out-of-the-box data model with third-party data.

Step 5: Integrating SAP BW/4 HANA Objects into SAP Business Data Cloud

You can also integrate your existing SAP BW/4HANA objects into SAP Business Data Cloud. Using a dedicated data provisioning tool, you can onboard SAP BW objects into SAP Datasphere and seamlessly combine them with the existing data model.

 

Step 6: Reports with AI-Powered Insights

SAP Business Data Cloud offers a variety of consumption options for your data model. One example is the AI-powered Just Ask feature in SAP Analytics Cloud. Leveraging natural language processing, it allows you to retrieve insights simply by typing a question about your data. The system instantly responds, presenting the information in the most suitable format or you can also use Insight App dashboards.

Conclusion:

SAP Business Data Cloud enables businesses to seamlessly integrate, harmonize, and analyze data from multiple sources, transforming raw data into actionable insights. By leveraging AI-driven analytics and automation, organizations can make data-driven decisions with confidence. With its out-of-the-box Insight Apps and seamless integration with SAP solutions, it provides a trusted and unified platform for enterprise data management.

References:

For more details, please see the references below:

SAP Business Data Cloud – Overview

SAP Business Data Cloud – Key Features

SAP & Databricks: A Bold New Era of Data and AI

SAP Business Data Cloud Introduction

SAP Business Data Cloud – Interactive Product Tour

Thank you,
Venu

entry.title: Re: Using class CL_ABAP_PARALLEL for mass parallel dialog work processes
entry.content:
Thanks. In ABAP 7.58, I can see that CL_ABAP_PARALLEL documentation is provided:

  1. via its ABAP Doc comments,
  2. via this short introduction in the SAP Help Portal, Parallel Processing (*), and finally refers to the ABAP Doc comments.

There are also other features in CL_ABAP_PARALLEL:

  • The method RUN_INST can be used instead of RUN. It makes your custom code shorter by avoiding the serialization and deserialization of parameters which are done by CL_ABAP_PARALLEL. The principle of your custom code is to create directly an instance of CL_ABAP_PARALLEL, and each task is to be an instance of a custom class, with attributes for input and result data, implementing the interface IF_ABAP_PARALLEL, which is serializable (IF_SERIALIZABLE_OBJECT) and has the DO method. To start the parallelization, RUN_INST is to be run on the CL_ABAP_PARALLEL instance with the table of your "instance tasks" as input parameter. The result is a copy of your "instance tasks" which contain the results as instance attributes. One example is shown in the ABAP Doc comments of CL_ABAP_PARALLEL.
  • In case your custom application needs to get the results any time before the end of ALL tasks (for instance to achieve high performance in case of chained parallel processes), you  may use the methods FORK, JOIN and IS_COMPLETED. FORK starts one asynchronous task to start all the tasks. JOIN is to get the results of completed tasks, and so JOIN may be called several times till all tasks are completed.
  • There are also the methods FORK_INST and JOIN_INST (same principle as RUN_INST).
  • CONSTRUCTOR has the additional parameter P_ABORT_ON_ERROR to stop starting the remaining tasks if one has heavily failed (RFC communication error, short dump). Technically speaking, the remaining RFC tasks start but end immediately before calling the method DO.
  • CONSTRUCTOR has the additional parameter P_KEEPING_TASKS to not close the RFC connection after each task to manage buffered data. The concept is the same as RECEIVE RESULTS FROM FUNCTION funcname KEEPING TASK. You may close the connection explicitly via the method TERMINATE.
  • There is also the method START_INST_IN_BACKGROUND if you want to use bgRFC.
  • NB: don't use the public methods END_TASK and END_TASK_INT which are reserved to SAP for internal use.

(*) Full path in the SAP Help Portal: Home > SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition > Developer Extensibility > Development in the ABAP Environment > Reuse Services and Libraries > ABAP Language > Parallel Processing)

entry.title: Re: Asynchronous code execution using ABAP Cloud
entry.content: Hi @Mario , we are using SAP S/4 HANA on premise 2022 and are using RAP events , with BTP event mesh. But unfortunately we dont find  cl_abap_behavior_event_handler for local consumption. Is there any direction i should look towards ?

entry.title: cannot reschedule test after a failed test
entry.content: I scheduled a test today for C_SIGBT_2409 Certification but failed the test with score of 71, passing is 75. I need to reschedule a new test, this is urgent I need to do this before end of March 2025. But the exam appointment page showing my old appointment with a green clock and does not allow me to schedule new one. It shows a green clock instead of a calendar to pick new date. Appreciate your help!

entry.title: Re: cannot reschedule test after a failed test
entry.content:
Also I opened case at SAP Learning Self Service(s) and got a case ID but no one replied yet.

Also see
Attempts remaining: 3/4

so I have enough exam attempt remaining.

entry.title: Re: Can we set mandatory for attachments
entry.content:
Yes,

You can do this with an edit with a QBQuery based expression.

NOTE: This Entity Edit may have a significant impact on Posting Performance

1. Create a QBQuery (QBQueryID = 'EE_Test' for this example) with Query Context of Expression with the following SQL (assuming that you want to check for attachments on the Broker record

  select count(e.entityattno)  as num from entityatt e
    inner join broker b on b.brokerno=e.entvalue and e.entname='BROKER'
    and b.brokerno=${brokerno)

2, Create an Entity Edit for the Broker Entity with the following expression  (using the QBQueryId of the Query above)

  att=query('EE_Test',1,BrokerNo)
    if(att > 0 )
    return true 
    else return false

3. This Entity Edit will prevent a Broker record from being saved if there are no attachments for this broker.

Hope this helps!

Phillip Butts

entry.title: Re: Entity Fields - Agent Performance Management
entry.content:
You can use an Entity Edit to prevent changes once the record has been created.

The entity edit expression would look something like:

if(old_BrokerType == BrokerType && //Value that you want base the read only attribute on

old_BrokerRef1 != BrokerRef1). //Value you want to make ready only

return true

else return false

Hope this helps!

Phillip Butts

entry.title: Re: Sample File Link on Detail Screen - Agent Performance Management
entry.content: Hi, Im not following. What is the purpose of importing a file if not for using an import format?

entry.title: Reimagined Candidate Experience (RCM-129221) enablement
entry.content: The enablement for RCM-129221 is stated as Customer configured; but in the Configuration Requirements there is nothing specific for the reimagined canidate experience vs the current experience. Where can we decide if we want to move to the reimagined version or not?

entry.title: Maximum period Alumni (OBX-31773)?
entry.content: the documentation mentions 'If the access period rule isn't defined, the default value is 365 days from the day of Alumni Access initiation.'; is there a maximum period that can be set?

entry.title: Re: unable to drill down in a Crystal report chart
entry.content:
HI Keith,

I heard back fro Support, try this:

I have heard of one case on Patch 11 where right-click didn’t work in CMC and the plus button also didn’t work.
The cause was found to be a Custom Properties file in C:\Program Files (x86)\SAP BusinessObjects\tomcat\webapps\BOE\WEB-INF\config\custom and incorrect SAML configuration.

is the failing server an upgraded server?  It seems the one he build for testing works fine?.   Hi can try and see if the right-click context menus don’t work or if folders won’t expand.  If so it may be related to the issue in the viewer.

It’s a long shot but maybe worth checking.

 

https://me.sap.com/notes/3586958

Resolution 1:

  • Review and fix any issues with server.xml (check a working environment). 
  • Test the functionality on HTTP (8080) connector first before testing on SSL (8443) connector. 
  • Before starting the tomcat, Try clearing the tomcat cache by referring: 1879431 - How to clear Tomcat cache? - SAP for Me 
  • Try restarting the tomcat and see that navigation and right click within CMC starts working

Resolution 2:

If Resolution 1 does not work, You can follow the below steps:

  • Stop Tomcat
  • To narrow down the issue, remove any custom properties files.  Navigate to the custom directory EG: C:\Program Files (x86)\SAP BusinessObjects\tomcat\webapps\BOE\WEB-INF\config\custom and copy the contents inside custom directory to any other location.
  • Remove the existing files in custom directory.
  • Clear the tomcat cache by referring: 1879431 - How to clear Tomcat cache? - SAP for Me 
  • Restart tomcat and see that navigation and right click within CMC starts working.
  • (Optional) After this, if still required, configure SAML by referring to KBA 2791348 - How To: Configure Front-End SAML Authentication on BI 4.3 - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: ABAP OOP Syntax help
entry.content: Class CL_GUI_ALV_GRID_BASE has a method GET_SELECTED_ROWS_ID_BASE which will return the table ROW_TABLE which should contain all the selected rows. ROW_TABLE contains the ROW_ID you are looking for. Use the instance of CL_GUI_ALV_GRID_BASE to call this method to get the ROW_ID. Hope it helps.

entry.title: Re: generating excel with repeated headers from MPP
entry.content:
From limited understanding of your question, here is my suggestion.

When using ABAP2XLSX, anyway you would be looping through item table nested inside the main loop on header table I suppose. For each header record, you can create the heading row in excel followed with header values and one more heading row for items followed with list of item values. Again, in the next main header loop iteration add a new heading row in the excel and so on. 

Maybe if you could provide some sample data of multiple header and line items and also a sample of your planned internal table structure, we can provide better answers.

entry.title: CDS的字段值显示问题
entry.content:
Hi All，

我基于数据源I_SalesDocumentItem 创建了CDS ，场景是外部API。 我选择了元素I_SalesDocumentItem.ShippingPoint，此时，我点击该CDS的按钮数据浏览器，预览数据是正确的。

但是，I_SalesDocumentItem.ShippingPoint只有代码，没有相应的名称，因此，我添加了I_SalesDocumentItem._ShippingPoint._Text.ShippingPointName，这样，我就可以查看名称了，但是，我再次在数据浏览器中查看数据，发现了数据错误，由于ShippingPoint在系统后台中维护了中、英的名称描述，结果，数据重复显示了，一行销售订单项目结果显示了两行。

大家有什么办法吗？要独立再创建一个ShippingPoint的API 的CDS？这样的工作量太大了。还有其他的字段存在同样的情况。

entry.title: Cannot see alternate Unit of Measure quantity in Stock Overview
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I'd like to see alternate UoM quantity for the product DIGITS in common task Stock Overview.

Please let me know how I can see alternate UoM quantity.

Best regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Cannot see alternate Unit of Measure quantity in Stoc...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

In Stock Overview, add field "Alternative Quantity" into the table through Personalization Mode. Then search product DIGITS and select your expected UoM for filter "Alternative Unit of Measure", click Go. In the result, you can find on-hand quantity with that UoM in field "Alternative Quantity".

Henry

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: BTP Trial ABAP environment - not working
entry.content: perfect

entry.title: Re: Extractors / CDS-Views for Capex Investment, Cash Flo...
entry.content:
Hi Gilou,

I may not provide the exact CDS view. However I can provide you some general steps to seek for the required CDS view (not only in Cashflow area but also other areas).

  1. Firstly you may go through the blog: Finding the right CDS Extractor in SAP S/4HANA - SAP Community
  2. Secondly, you may search SAP Notes using keywords: CDS extraction Cash Flow. Try to check the notes to see which provides a Cash flow CDS which's extraction-enabled.
  3. Thirdly, you may also check view RSODPABAPCDSEXTR directly in your s/4 system. Display all records and in the result, search using keywords "cash flow". Then check the CDS views one by one to see which one can fulfill your requirement.

Regards,
Maggie

entry.title: SAP TM - Container Unit Creation Question
entry.content:
Hey Community,

I am reaching out to get some guidance on a scenario I am currently working on at work:

We send our PO data to our Freight Forwarders and they send the Container Load Plan back to us, which we then plan in SAP TM (Planning based on actuals). We often have the situation where we have multiple (example three) POs with different destinations. The Freight Forwarder ships those three POs in one container and we organise the transfer of the stock once the container has been unpacked.

In the system we only plan the Freight Unit for the PO that the container gets shipped to and ignore the two Freight Units for the other POs. We now found that the cost distribution is not working as expected, because we do not plan all POs/ Freight Units.

Is there a way to plan the container with all Freight Units without needing to change the POs?

Cheers

Tobias

entry.title: Re: 🇫🇷 SAP Build: Create Event-Based Processes (Paris, France)
entry.content: It was changed to June 10 so not to fall on the holiday. Do you still see anywhere where it says the old date?

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified
entry.content: Hi @Suzanne_Heiob  I have completed Stay certified assessment for both of my existing certification However certification history not updated yet in learning hub  please suggest

entry.title: Unlock Seamless Identity Management with Our SAP Customer Data Cloud REST API Live Session!
entry.content:
In today's fast-paced digital world, efficient identity management is the cornerstone of secure and streamlined customer interactions. Are you ready to revolutionize the way you handle customer identities? We invite you to join our compelling live session Seamless Customer Identity Management: Mastering SAP Customer Data Cloud REST APIs on May 16, 2025, 15:30 - 17:00 SGT or 9:30 - 11:00 CET.

Why Attend?

This interactive session is designed to empower you with the knowledge and skills necessary to master SAP Customer Data Cloud REST API. Whether you are a technical consultant, functional consultant, or administrator, this session will provide valuable insights that cater to your specific needs.

What’s on the Agenda?

Prepare to dive deep into the world of REST API as our team of experts guide you through a transformative learning experience. Here's what you'll achieve by the end of the session:

  • A Comprehensive Understanding of REST APIs: Gain a robust understanding of the full range of SAP Customer Data Cloud REST APIs and how they can streamline your identity management processes.
  • Master Key API Tools and Methods: Learn how to leverage essential API tools and methods for an efficient implementation that supercharges your identity flows.
  • Achieve Seamless and Secure Identity Flows: Implement the knowledge gained to deliver secure and effortless identity flows, enhancing customer experience and boosting operational efficiency.

Who Should Attend?

This session is tailored for a diverse audience, including:

  • Technical Consultants: Enhance your technical toolkit with advanced API strategies.
  • Functional Consultants: Gain insights into how APIs can optimize functional workflows.
  • Administrators: Acquire the skills to robustly manage customer identities with precision.

Join Us for an Engaging Experience!

Get ready to embark on a journey of transformation. This session promises to be engaging, interactive, and immensely beneficial for you and your team.

📅May 16, 2025

⏰15:30 - 17:00 SGT (9:30 - 11:00 CET)

💻Location: SAP Learning Site

Secure your spot today and take a decisive step towards mastering customer identity management with SAP Customer Data Cloud REST API. Register now and don’t miss out on this opportunity to enhance your technical prowess!

We're excited to connect and explore the endless possibilities of SAP Customer Data Cloud REST API with you. See you there!

entry.title: Re: set an LMS item-the beginning of their employment,on6...
entry.content:
Hello there,

Given that this requirement has also been raised by many of our LMS customers, I have done some research and there is actually an enhancement note for this feature already (here). This note is currently in the status of "Under Review".

Not sure what the outcome may be but voting for it or leaving a note may help SAP consider why this function is important.

Thanks,
Sunny

entry.title: Re: SAP TM - Container Unit Creation Question
entry.content:
Hi @TobiasBauer,

Could you help to answer few questions.

Are you working from Manufacture/OEM/Plant/Shipper or Carrier side? What is PO ? Is this Purchase Order for Fright Forwarder for Transport? Is this Purchase Order for Supplier/Vendor ? How are you planning "plan in SAP TM (Planning based on actuals)" ?

"Is there a way to plan the container with all Freight Units without needing to change the POs?" -> Yes please see the screen shot where you can add multiple FUs. 

Assumption:

Also see the concept of " Consignment Order" ( see click below for details ) where you load cost on different FUs/POs, you do not have to change in PO

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/e3dc5400c1cc41d1bc0ae0e7fd9aa5a2/908e8ab6945a47edb1ade56ec6533b2f.html?locale=en-US

Assumption for your scenario:

#3 FUs=> 1 Container => 1FO => 3 Consignment Orders => Cost distribution on 3 documents...

It would be nice if you answer to provide clarity then someone could help you.

Kind regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: Update B1 Production Order stage via Service Layer
entry.content:
Hi ManuelDias,

Yes, it appears that these fields are not exposed.

Refer to this link for the same: Cannot update WOR1 Status field with DIAPI 

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: SAP TM - Container Unit Creation Question
entry.content:
@Ajit_Routray,

Thank you for your response.

I work for the retailer and we use a Freight Forwarder to ship products for us from the supplier to our Warehouse (FOB incoterm).

Yes, PO is the Purchase Order that our Replenishment Team send to the supplier and we also send it to the Freight Forwarder, who utilises a container freight station to optimise the container space. We then get the container load plan back that we plan in SAP TM. The POs get transmitted from S4/HANA to SAP TM and creates the Freight Units (1 FU = 1 PO). We use the Transportation Cockpit to identify the FUs and create the Container Unit, Freight Booking & Freight Order. The Freight Unit get created based on the PO (Order-based Transportation Requirements) hence we have three Freight Units/ POs with different destination locations, which I want to combine in one Container Unit.

I did a test where I selected all three FUs and created the Container Unit, but then the Container Unit has multiple stages. Usually we have two stages Port to Port and Port to Warehouse. 

Can I adjust the FUs or the Container Unit to just one destination? 

Thanks - I will review the consignment order concept. 🙂

Tobias

entry.title: Re: ABAP OOP Syntax help
entry.content: You may need OO knowledge: if your custom class inherits from a given class (e.g. CL_GUI_ALV_GRID_BASE), you may call any public method from this inherited class.

entry.title: Dynamic Visibility of Input Controls in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
In SAP Analytics Cloud, is it possible to dynamically show or hide specific Input Controls based on the values of other filters, such as a slider, switch, or box list?

For example, if a user selects a adjusts a slider to a specific range, can other Input Controls be automatically hidden or displayed accordingly?

Thank you in advance for your assistance and guidance!

entry.content:

as i am facing issue as below

Regards,

Karthik

entry.title: Re: Business Application Studio - modules not recognized...
entry.content:
Hello.

I’m facing a similar issue to yours. My CDS files have working autocompletion and syntax checking, but when I create a SAPUI5 project with TypeScript inside the CAP project, the syntax checking and autocompletion in my SAPUI5 Project no longer work. I’ve also tried creating a new Dev Space, but the problem persists.

Have you found a solution yet?

entry.title: Re: Iranian Calendar issue leap year
entry.content: check note 3567476

entry.title: 回复： SAP S/4HANA Cloud公有云版本中三系统开发扩展性与二系统关键用户扩展性报表开发对比
entry.content:
我公司使用的是二系统，确实遇到这样的问题，算库龄分析，移库的，会影响库龄，也没办法搞上架时间（最早过账时间和最迟过账时间） ，请问专家，在二系统上有什么办法出这样的库龄分析表？（公司级分析，不分存储地点）

公司，货号，大于18个月的数量，18个月--6个月的数量，0-6个月的数量，最早过账时间、最新的过账时间

entry.title: Re: Urgent: Incorrect Date Handling for Persian Leap Year...
entry.content: check note 3567476

entry.title: Re: Urgent: Incorrect Date Handling for Persian Leap Year 1403 in SAP System
entry.content: check note 3567476

entry.title: Re: How to Approve/Reject Task via API in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
@padma_kumar_perumal Can you provide more information, for example:

  • Are you using Public or other environment?
  • How are you making the call?
  • Are you using a destination? If so, how is it configured?
  • Are your roles given to your default user or custom user?
  • How did you trigger the process? And whose credentials were used?

On my trial account, I created a new process with API trigger, deployed to a custom environment, then through Postman I was able to retrieve the context and logs using just the API key info for the service.

I am assuming you are doing something different since using just the ID/secret to connect would not involve any "user".

entry.title: Re: Display percentage for a calculated measure in Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi,

As far as the calculations performed in the Analytical Model, we do not see a way out to have the percentage display possibility. 

the possible options as we currently see are either at the Fact Model level or at SAC level as on today.

Thanks

entry.title: How long to get a learning journey code error be fixed by asking https://support.learning.sap.com
entry.content:
I have reported a code error in one of the free SAP Learning Journeys (*) via https://support.learning.sap.com, two months ago, but still no answer. Note that I got the information 90 minutes after posting that my report was forwarded "to the relevant team as they are more efficient and reliable when it comes to this kind of matter" (i.e. a code error).

How long should I wait, i.e. what is your experience?

Thank you.

Sandra

(*) Specifically: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/learn-the-basics-of-abap-programming-on-sap-btp

entry.title: Payment proposal processing.
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

In F110 SAP, I can see only the amount of the invoice in the payment proposal but are unable to open the invoice details (pdf) . If i want to check the Invoice i have to open separate Vendor Account.

Does anyone here have the same experience? or any constructive suggestion to help me solve my issue.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Payment suggestion list display
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a direct debit agreement with the Supplier. The master data also includes the payment terms " Direct Debit". However, this payment still appears on my payment suggestion list. How can i resolve this Issue ?

 

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: How long to get a learning journey code error be fixe...
entry.content:
In my case, 2.5 months between report and resolution:

  1. I reported a code error on January 15th, 2025, at 12:49pm (see below content).
  2. I obtained a first answer the same day at 2:15pm, that it was forwarded "to the relevant team as they are more efficient and reliable when it comes to this kind of matter".
  3. I obtained a second answer on March 28th that "as per the relevant team it is now correct and live", and the case was in status "Customer Action".
  4. I replied that it was fine and requested to close the case.

For information, here was my request:

Email/User ID for login: <my Email> and <my S-User>
What SAP Platform (URLs)? https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/learn-the-basics-of-abap-programming-on-sap-btp/building-an-abap-restful-application
Course name: Learning the Basics of ABAP Programming on SAP BTP
Code unit name: Building an ABAP RESTful Application
Page number: N/A

Detail steps with screenshots (Screenshots of any error message will assist in quicker resolution times):

Go to the lesson "Building an ABAP RESTful Application" (same name as code unit).

Go to this part: "Steps 1. Enable the search capabilities in the Data Definition file ZC_XX_GROCERY for fields Product, Category, Brand, ExpirationDate, Expired , and Rating. Replace the code in the data definition file by copying and pasting the solution code below."

The tutorial shows one code snippet, two sentences after the text above.

See the code snippet in the screenshot attached (file "missing annotation search.defaultSearchElement true.png")

The Code Snippet has an empty line instead of "@Search.defaultSearchElement: true" for all the 6 fields mentioned.

Thank you.

Attached screenshot:

entry.title: Re: Unable to see destinations for BPA deployment
entry.content:
Hello, 
So when we go to control tower in SAP Build, you will see a option of destination 
There click on that option, and then you will see the destination which you have created in the cockpit and happily add the one or more whichever you want to set as final destination in our workflow.

Then most likely you will see them 🙂

entry.title: Re: SAP TM - Container Unit Creation Question
entry.content:
Hi @TobiasBauer,

Thank you for Providing info!

“Can I adjust the FUs or the Container Unit to just one destination? “-> You mean source is supplier and Warehouse is destination. When you plan then it split…

Also incoterms location no plan…

https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-q-a/fu-can-have-more-than-3-stages/qaq-p/12792568

https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-blogs-by-sap/incoterm-location-in-freight-unit-stage-building-of-sap-tm/ba-p/13507083

FUs have 3 stages at least

  1. Supplier  to Port ( No planning since FOB-  )
  2. Port to Port  ( Planning needed -Fright Booking – Stage 2 - Container added here  )
  3. Port to Warehouse ( Planning needed – Freight Order – Stage 3 –  )

I think you need 2 step approach

  • Assigned FUs into Container
  • Selected Planning for Stage 2 and 3Create Profile (Selection Profile …etc adjust accordingly)  

*Either Combined below both (Source is port and destination is warehouse)

 or do individual Plan

Freight Booking for Stage Port to Port  *Selection Profile…Source Location is port and destination is port

Freight Order for  stage Discharge Port to Warehouse  *Selection Profile …

Please let us know if further questions.

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: Updating hostname of AIX having Netweaver server installed
entry.content: Hello,

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Identity Services - SAML 2.0 Automatic Certificate Renewal [metadata URL is must]
entry.content: This has been really useful and neccessary

entry.title: Re: Updating hostname of AIX having Netweaver server installed
entry.content: Hello, if you change hostname of AIX server, you have to perform a system rename of the SAP NetWeaver server using SWPM and using the new hostname.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to use F4 help event of CL_GUI_ALV_GRID for CL_SALV_TABLE related program
entry.content: Hi @Sandra_Rossi, I have gone to the link you shared, but as I have mentioned, i am using CL_SALV_TABLE in the program, and I want to use the event of CL_GUI_ALV_GRID and I want the linking between these two classes so that I can use onF4 Event in cl_salv_table

entry.title: Re: Payment suggestion list display
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

The issue described is that a payment with "Direct Debit" payment terms still appears in the payment suggestion list. Here are some potential reasons and solutions:

 

  1. Check the Payment Method in Vendor Master Data

Ensure that the supplier's master data (transaction BP or FK02) has a payment method configured for direct debit (e.g., D for direct debit).

The bank details for the supplier should also be correctly maintained.

 

  1. Verify the Payment Proposal Configuration

In the Payment Proposal (F110), check whether the payment method used in the proposal is consistent with direct debit processing.

Ensure that direct debit transactions are excluded from the payment proposal selection criteria.

 

  1. Review Payment Terms & Open Items

The payment term "Direct Debit" should be linked to a relevant automatic payment configuration.

Open items might still be incorrectly included due to missing direct debit clearing. Check the document status (FBL1N for vendor line items).

 

  1. Check the Automatic Payment Program Configuration

In FBZP (Automatic Payment Program settings), verify the configuration of payment methods and whether direct debit payments are being processed correctly.

 

  1. Investigate Posting Issues

If a direct debit mandate exists but is not linked to the invoice, the system may not process it correctly. Verify the mandate assignment using FBL1N or F110.

 

I hope this will help you answer your questions.

P.S : In case you still haven’t found a solution to your issue, please provide a detailed Word file with all necessary screenshots.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Dump Background job program /SCWM/RBINMATMNT, Tcode /SCWM/BINMAT
Re: Payment proposal processing.
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

In F110 (Automatic Payment Program), if you can only see the invoice amount in the payment proposal but cannot open the invoice details directly, try these steps to access the invoice details within the payment proposal:

Solution 1: Check Payment Proposal Details

  1. Open Transaction F110

Go to the "Status" tab.

Click on the Payment Proposal (Proposal Overview).

 

  1. Display Line Items

Double-click on the payment proposal line item to check if it opens further details.

If not, proceed to the next solution.

 

Solution 2: Use Payment Proposal Log

  1. In F110, navigate to the Proposal Log (inside the "Status" tab).

 

  1. Look for any warnings or errors related to the invoice.

 

  1. If needed, switch to transaction FBL1N (Vendor Line Item Display) to cross-check the invoice document.

 

Solution 3: Enable Invoice Display in F110

  1. If you have restricted authorization, ask your SAP Basis team to check the authorization objects assigned to your user.

Ensure you have the necessary display authorization for invoice details in F110.

 

  1. Verify the configuration settings in FBZP (Automatic Payment Program).

Go to FBZP → Payment Methods per Country/Company Code.

Ensure that the details of invoices are not being summarized in a way that hides individual invoices.

 

Solution 4: Use FBL1N or FBL3N for Invoice Details

If you still cannot see invoice details within F110, manually open FBL1N:

  1. Go to FBL1N (Vendor Line Item Display).

 

  1. Enter the Vendor Number and select the relevant date range.

 

  1. Search for the invoice using the document number from F110.

 

  1. Click on the invoice to view details.

 

I hope this will help you answer your questions.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to use F4 help event of CL_GUI_ALV_GRID for CL_SALV_TABLE related program
entry.content:
Apologies. The question has been already asked how to get the instance of CL_GUI_ALV_GRID instantiated by CL_SALV_TABLE internally. It's often asked in the questions about how to make CL_SALV_TABLE support the editable mode. The answer depends whether the ABAP version is 7.56 or other.

https://www.google.com/search?q=editable+CL_SALV_TABLE+site%3Asap.com

I'm trying to post a vendor invoice on MIRO. In this case, I must use the G/L Account tab

When I enter all the data needed, everything seems fine

 

But once I hit POST I get the error below

I have already checked most of available sap notes regarding this error message but non of them is applicable in my case.

PS : i'm not using any special stock in my purchasing.

Looking forward for your help.

 

Regards.

entry.title: Re: New Trusted Authentication for Single Server installation and Entra Id
entry.content: After looking through the documents you provided links for, it sounds to me like this is something to be avoided right now until SAP gets some bugs worked out. I would suggest upgrading to a lower patch level that doesn't include this new trusted authentication if you can.

entry.title: Elevate Customer Engagement with SAP Customer Data Cloud: Register Our Action-Packed Live Session
entry.content:
In the fast-paced digital world, enhancing customer identity and access management is key to transforming customer engagement. Are you ready to take your skills to the next level? Don’t miss our interactive live session on SAP Customer Data Cloud CIAM, where you'll uncover strategies to elevate customer interactions and create secure, scalable solutions.

Session Overview

This engaging session is your door to mastering SAP Customer Data Cloud’s capabilities. Gain hands-on experience with demos designed to guide you through the SAP CDC Console, CDC sites, and the seamless creation of login and registration flows. Transform your business and your skills by embracing cutting-edge CIAM practices.

What You'll Learn

Dive deep into the world of SAP Customer Data Cloud with expert guidance, ensuring you leave equipped with practical knowledge and skills:

  • Unlock Capabilities: Explore the robust features of SAP Customer Data Cloud.
  • Console Mastery: Navigate and utilize the SAP CDC Console with efficiency.
  • Site Management: Build and manage sophisticated CDC sites and site groups with confidence.
  • Identification and Registration: Implement effective flows for identifying and registering users seamlessly.
  • Custom User Experiences: Harness the power of the UI Builder to customize and enhance user experiences.

Who Should Attend

Whether you're a business end user, technical consultant, functional consultant, or administrator, this session offers insights and tools tailored to elevate your CIAM strategies and customer engagement capabilities.

Event Details

  • Date & Time: May 12, 2025, 15:00 - 16:30 CET
  • Platform: SAP Learning Site
  • Registration Link: https://learning.sap.com/live-sessions/transforming-customer-engagement-getting-started-on-sap-customer-data-cloud

Don't let this chance to revolutionize your customer engagement slip by. Secure your spot now and start the journey to mastering CIAM with SAP Customer Data Cloud.

Register Now

Prepare to transform customer interactions—see you at the session!

entry.title: Elevate Your Data Privacy Standards with SAP ECPM: Secure Your Spot for an Insightful Live Session!
entry.content:
In a world where data privacy and compliance have become critical benchmarks for business success, mastering these elements is not just a necessity—it's an art. Are you prepared to be at the forefront of this transformation? Register now for an impactful live session on SAP Customer Data Cloud's ECPM solution, where you'll unlock strategies to revolutionize your approach to data privacy and consent management.

Session Overview

Efficient data privacy and compliance are the cornerstone of customer trust and regulatory alignment. This session is your gateway to understanding and implementing SAP's Enterprise Consent and Preference Management (ECPM) solution. Dive into the creation of robust consent statements, and discover how to leverage the intuitive Consent Vault to store and manage consent interactions effectively.

What You'll Gain

Our session is designed to empower you with practical insights and actionable strategies, facilitated by industry experts passionate about data privacy.

Here’s what you'll master:

  • Essentials of Data Privacy: Learn to navigate the critical components of data privacy and compliance with SAP ECPM.
  • Crafting Compliant Consent Statements: Discover how to build comprehensive consent statements that bolster compliance.
  • Consent Management: Utilize the Consent Vault efficiently for storing and managing consent interactions.
  • Regulatory Compliance and Trust Building: Ensure seamless adherence to regulations while enhancing customer trust and brand reputation.

Who Should Attend

This live session is ideal for business end users, technical consultants, functional consultants, and administrators seeking to elevate their data privacy and compliance capabilities. No matter your role, you'll gain insights that empower you to lead your organization toward superior data management practices.

Why Participation is Essential

Being compliant means more than just ticking boxes—it’s about fostering trust and sustaining customer loyalty. Engage with our interactive discussions and demonstrations to transform your data privacy strategies. This session is a unique opportunity to engross yourself in an expert-led environment that enriches your understanding and sharpens your skills.

Event Details

  • Date & Time: May 14, 2025, 15:00 - 16:30 CET
  • Platform: SAP Learning Site
  • Registration Link: https://learning.sap.com/live-sessions/mastering-data-privacy-and-compliance-unleashing-sap-customer-data-cloud-ecpm

Don't miss out on mastering data privacy and compliance with SAP Customer Data Cloud ECPM. Secure your spot today and embark on a transformative journey to fortify your organization’s approach to data protection and regulatory excellence.

Register Now

Transform your data privacy framework—ignite your expertise with us.

entry.title: Re: In-House Repair in S/4HANA Service - Start with an Overview
entry.content: @Udo thanks for the confirmation  but if sold-to party is wrong, there will be no repair equipment present to be added, hence it wouldn't appear in perform prechecks app. In such cases from where (which app) can we mark the In-House repair as completed?

entry.title: SAP Inside Track RJ 2025 Summary – A Successful Event in Rio de Janeiro
entry.content:
SAP Inside Track RJ 2025 took place last Saturday at a hotel located in Botafogo with a stunning view of Guanabara Bay. The event had a packed amphitheater, highlighting the high level of engagement of the SAP community. The organization was impeccable, providing a pleasant environment with coffee breaks in the morning and afternoon, exclusive event t-shirts for all participants, and gifts offered by sponsors.

The event's great difference was the highly interactive lectures, which promoted enriching discussions among participants on relevant topics in the technical and functional areas. Among the topics that generated the most debate were Clean Core, SAP Grow, and the implementation of DRC. The most interesting thing was the diversity of perspectives, where each argument made sense within its context.

The program included high-level presentations, including:

  • Manuel Robalinho, presenting innovations on connectivity in the financial area and cash flow with AI;

  • Jonys Arcanjo, addressing news in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC);

  • Marssel Vilaça, speaking about SAP Community engagement;

  • Renan Correa, providing insights on DRC and its implementation;

  • Fabio Dezan, with an excellent talk on Brazil Localization;

  • Luciano Casado, explaining the integration of Apps with SAP Grow;

  • João Secco, delving deeper into the concept of Clean Core;

  • Ely Barbosa, with a practical and fun class on project management and common mistakes that should be avoided.

  • João Secco, delving deeper into the concept of Clean Core;

After a day of learning and sharing experiences, the participants ended the event at a nearby bar, where they continued the conversation in a relaxed atmosphere.

Congratulations to the organization for providing such an enriching event for the SAP community in Rio de Janeiro! 🚀👏

entry.title: Re: Market Process Management For Utilities - An introduction
entry.content:
Hi PieterB,

thanks for the nice explanation as well as your experience using the MPM for utilities.
Do you have any suggestion or reading material so that I can go deeper into this topic.

Best Regards,

ud39

entry.title: O que o Linkedin mostrou sobre o #SITRIO2025
entry.content:
Este foi um evento para ficar na memória para sempre.

O Rio de Janeiro já havia sediado seu primeiro SAP Inside Track em 2011, tornando-se a segunda cidade do Brasil a receber o maior evento da comunidade SAP. Desde então, tivemos outras edições em diferentes formatos, como Meetups e novos SAP Inside Tracks. Mas a edição de 2025 foi diferente. Uma verdadeira reinvenção do SAP Inside Track.

 

Com uma equipe de organização super dedicada, esta edição foi totalmente remodelada e entregou o melhor evento SAP não-oficial já realizado na Cidade Maravilhosa. Parabéns demais a todos os envolvidos!

 

Agradecimento aos patrocinadores

Obrigado a todas as grandes marcas do mercado SAP que nos apoiaram. Nada disso seria possível sem essa grande ajuda na disseminação do conhecimento.

 

 

Conteúdo de Altíssimo Nível

As apresentações trouxeram os principais temas da atualidade no universo SAP, abordando:

Clean Core
SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Localization
Inteligência Artificial
Práticas fiscais e legais para o Brasil
Metodologias de projeto com dicas práticas

Os palestrantes deram um verdadeiro show à parte. Domínio técnico, carisma e conteúdo valioso marcaram cada fala. E a melhor parte? Você pode conferir a gravação completa do evento no YouTube. As apresentações estão disponíveis individualmente por meio dos links na descrição do vídeo. Imperdível!

Lista de Palestras:

00:00:00 Abertura do SAP Inside Track Rio de Janeiro 2025

00:08:52 ➤ Marssel Vilaça ‪@marssel700‬: Comunidade SAP

00:19:01 ➤ João Secco ‪@moovieducation‬: Clean Core para Funcionais - Como proceder?

01:50:18 ➤ Manuel Robalinho ‪@sitfor-sapinsidetrackforta6071‬ : Inovações nas interfaces bancarias

02:33:38 ➤ Jonys Arcanjo: SAP Analytics Cloud: Soluções Inteligentes para Negócios Orientados por Dados

03:11:01 Painel de Perguntas & Respostas: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

03:34:10 ➤ Luciano Casado: Pagamento com cartões integrado ao SAP S/4HANA

04:17:23 ➤ Fabio Dezan ‪@FabioDezan‬: Mitos e Verdades sobre a Nova Localização Brasil e o Fim da TAXBRA no S/4HANA Public Edition

05:07:33 ➤ Lucas Ferreira: Como extrair o melhor do SAP com SAP Fiori e personalizações Clean Core.

06:25:48 ➤ Ely Barbosa: O que não fazer em projetos de implantação SAP

07:21:04 Sorteio SAP Press

07:24:20 ➤ Renan Correa ‪@s4cn‬: Onde o caldo entorna - Como superar os maiores desafios na implementação do DRC NFE

08:15:32 Sorteio Final de Brindes & SAP Press

08:19:55 Encerramento

 

A Repercussão nas Redes: O LinkedIn Foi à Loucura!

Antes, durante e depois do evento, o LinkedIn explodiu com postagens, fotos, vídeos e feedbacks. A empolgação era visível, as expectativas foram superadas e o alcance foi simplesmente fantástico.

Foi emocionante acompanhar tantos comentários carinhosos, elogios sinceros e depoimentos de profissionais de altíssimo nível. Gente que vive, respira e transforma o ecossistema SAP todos os dias. O sentimento de comunidade esteve presente em cada palavra.

A seguir, compartilho alguns dos melhores momentos extraídos diretamente do LinkedIn. Uma pequena amostra do impacto que o SAP Inside Track Rio de Janeiro 2025 deixou em todos nós.

 

Desafios e agradecimentos da Organização

Michelle Batista

Fofuras em excesso para relembrar o SIT Kids❤️

 

A voz do SIT RIO - O nosso Mestre de Cerimônia

Eduardo Palafoz

 

Hora do Almoço com vista para a Enseada de Botafogo! 

Rodrigo Silva

 

O que disseram os Palestrantes ?

Jonys Arcanjo

Luciano Casado

Ely Barbosa

João Secco

Lucas Freitas

Manuel Robalinho

Renan Correa

 

 

Colaboração fantástica dos Voluntários à Organização 

Milena Boniolo

 

Experiêcia adquirida pelos participantes

Ruy Castro

Marcelle Freitas

Rodolfo Doerl

Gabriel Galdino

Hellen Santana

Luciana Xavier

Adriana Brito

Thiago Neves

Gabriela Silva

Filipe Suarez

Oberdan Silva

Luiz Cesar Kuhnert

SAP Press Winners!

 

www.sitbrazil.com

entry.title: Re: Reforma tributária - ambientes
entry.content:
Olá Liziane, 

Geralmente, aplicamos primeiro num ambiente copia do QAS, verificamos tudo ali para depois subir para outras instancias. Sugiro que você verifique com a equipe do prejeto e com o seu cliente como eles pensam em realizar a aplicação de notas da SAP para Reforma tributária. 

Qualquer dúvida, estou a disposição. 

Michelle

entry.title: Re: Market Process Management For Utilities - An introduction
entry.content:
Hello @ud39,

in the following blog post you can find back more info about it: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/pieter-bangels_sneak-peek-market-process-management-for-activity-7223629582568951808-_SuQ?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAAADIphIBy5yPMeiKpTQJSFLkxZHgmW7_JXM

Also a lot of information can be found back on the SAP help page: Market Process Management for Utilities for SAP S/4HANA | SAP Help Portal

Don´t hesitate if you have questions about it.

Cheers,

Pieter

entry.title: Re: Alternative Way to get Invocices rather than using ISU_DB_ERCH_MASS
entry.content:
Hello @ud39,

This function module will only give back the billing documents and not the invoices. It is better to use
- one of the API´s within MultiChannel Foundation - E.g. SAP Business Accelerator Hub
- one of the existing CDS views (on S/4HANA) - E.g. Utilities Billing Document Data | SAP Help Portal

Regards,

Pieter

entry.title: Re: An Exception Was Raised – How Do I Fix This?
entry.content: Awesome Sachin !! understood 🙂

entry.title: SAP CAP With Prostgres Serice in BTP
entry.content:
There are already several blogs on using PostgreSQL with SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP). Notably, @mike_zaschka has shared an excellent blog on this topic. However, I wanted to provide a more comprehensive guide using the updated cap-js/postgre package instead of cds-pg, leveraging the PostgreSQL Trial service in SAP BTP.

In this blog, I will cover the following topics:

  • Setting up a CAP server with PostgreSQL instead of SAP HANA

  • Building and deploying the service in SAP BTP Cloud Foundry

  • Performing CRUD operations via Postman

  • Installing pgAdmin and connecting it to the deployed PostgreSQL database service

Step 1: Setting Up the CAP Project with PostgreSQL

1. Create a new project folder and initialize a CAP project:

mkdir BookShopPostgre && cd BookShopPostgre
cds init

2. Add a data-model.cds file inside the db folder with the following content:

using { Currency, managed, sap } from '@sap/cds/common';
namespace com.satya;

entity Books : managed {
  key ID   : Integer;
  title    : localized String(111)  @mandatory;
  descr    : localized String(1111);
  author   : Association to Authors @mandatory;
  genre    : Association to Genres;
  stock    : Integer;
  price    : Price;
  currency : Currency;
  image    : LargeBinary @Core.MediaType: 'image/png';
}

entity Authors : managed {
  key ID       : Integer;
  name         : String(111) @mandatory;
  dateOfBirth  : Date;
  dateOfDeath  : Date;
  placeOfBirth : String;
  placeOfDeath : String;
  books        : Association to many Books on books.author = $self;
}

/** Hierarchically organized Code List for Genres */
entity Genres : sap.common.CodeList {
  key ID   : Integer;
  parent   : Association to Genres;
  children : Composition of many Genres on children.parent = $self;
}

type Price : Decimal(9,2);


 3. Add `cat-service.cds` inside srv and define the service and expose entities as below - 

using { com.satya as my } from '../db/data-model';

service CatalogService @(path:'/browse') {

  entity Books as projection on my.Books;
  entity Authors as projection on my.Authors;
  entity Genres as projection on my.Genres;
    
  }

 

4. Add the MTA configuration by running:

cds add mta

This will generate the mta.yaml file in the root directory. You need to configure it to include the database module and define PostgreSQL resources.

_schema-version: 3.3.0
ID: BooKShopPostgre
version: 1.0.0
description: "Bookshop app with postgre db"
parameters:
  enable-parallel-deployments: true
build-parameters:
  before-all:
    - builder: custom
      commands:
        - npm ci
        - npx cds build --production
        
modules:
  - name: BooKShopPostgre-srv
    type: nodejs
    path: gen/srv
    parameters:
      buildpack: nodejs_buildpack
      readiness-health-check-type: http
      readiness-health-check-http-endpoint: /health
    build-parameters:
      builder: npm
    provides:
      - name: srv-api # required by consumers of CAP services (e.g. approuter)
        properties:
          srv-url: ${default-url}
    requires:
      - name: BooKShopPostgre-auth
      - name: BooKShopPostgre-postgres

  - name: BooKShopPostgre-postgres-deployer
    type: nodejs
    path: gen/pg
    parameters:
      buildpack: nodejs_buildpack
      no-route: true
      no-start: true
      tasks:
        - name: deploy-to-postgresql
          command: npm start
    requires:
      - name: BooKShopPostgre-postgres

resources:
  - name: BooKShopPostgre-auth
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service: xsuaa
      service-plan: application
      path: ./xs-security.json
      config:
        xsappname: BooKShopPostgreApp
        tenant-mode: dedicated
  - name: BooKShopPostgre-postgres
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service-name: Postgres-DB
      service: postgresql-db
      service-plan: trial

 

5. PostgreSQL requires additional deployment configurations. To package the database artifacts correctly, create a script named pg-build.sh with the following content:

#!/bin/bash
mkdir -p gen/pg/db
cds compile '*' > gen/pg/db/csn.json
cp package-lock.json gen/pg/package-lock.json

This script compiles the CDS files and moves the database artifacts to the gen folder.

Step 2: Configuring and Deploying to SAP BTP Cloud Foundry

1. Before building, ensure that your mta.yaml file is updated to execute pg-build.sh before packaging the MTA archive.

2. Create a PostgreSQL service instance in your SAP BTP trial account.

3. Before proceeding with the build process, update the mta.yaml file to execute pg-build.sh beforehand. This ensures that the script runs, and the compiled artifacts are copied to the gen folder before packaging the MTA archive.

parameters:
  enable-parallel-deployments: true
build-parameters:
  before-all:
    - builder: custom
      commands:
        - npm ci
        - npx cds build --production
        - ./pg-build.sh 
...

  

4. Build the MTA archive:

mbt build

This will generate a gen folder containing the PostgreSQL database artifacts.


5. Deploy the application:

cf deploy mta_archives/BookShopPostgre_1.0.0.mtar

 

Step 3: Performing CRUD Operations via Postman

Once the service is deployed, you can test it using Postman:

  • Create a book entry using the following request:

          

  • Fetch all books:

The service should return the stored book entries, confirming that CRUD operations are working correctly.

 

Step 4: Connecting to PostgreSQL via pgAdmin

To inspect the database, we use pgAdmin, similar to SAP HANA Cockpit.

 

Steps to Connect:

  1. Install pgAdmin4.

  2. Enable SSH tunneling and run the following command:

    cf ssh -L 63306:<postgres-host>:<postgres-port> BookShopPostgre-srv

    Replace <postgres-host> and <postgres-port> with values from your PostgreSQL service credentials.

  3. Open pgAdmin4 and configure the server connection:

    • Host: localhost

    • Port: 63306

    • Username: Use the database username from your credentials

    • Password: Use the corresponding password

  4. Once connected, use the Query Tool to run SQL queries, inspect tables, and validate the deployed artifacts.

image for reference. 

#

1. Open pgAdmin4 and configure the server as shown below.

 

2. Select the Query Tool to execute the SQL statement as shown below

3. Run the SQL and view the results

Similar to SAP HANA Database Explorer, you can run SQL queries and view all deployed artifacts.

Let me know if you encounter any issues.

Please find the complete code in the GitHub repository: BookShopPostgre

Happy coding! 🎉

entry.title: Re: Generate unique email adresses during the hire process
entry.content: Hi Arun,

entry.title: Re: Generate unique email adresses during the hire process
entry.content: Thank you, but I am not referring to first name and last name. I am referring to scenarios where they have two names in the field for first name.

entry.title: Both segments make-to-stock and planning without final assembly in ePPDS Product view
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

My concern is with ePPDS Product view (Tcode /N/SAPAPO/RRP3) that displays 2 segments "make-to-stock production" and "planning without final assembly" with different Planned Independent Requirements.

Do you know what could be the reason?

I manually cleaned the "planning without final assembly" part and it seems that it doesn't appear again.

But I have many SKUs like this and I'm searching for the root cause.

Thank you for your help.

entry.title: Re: Public Cloud Re-run Pricing
entry.content:
Hello,

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, there are alternative methods available for modifying sales orders. One such approach is leveraging Business Add-Ins (BAdIs), which provide predefined enhancement points to integrate custom logic into standard SAP processes.

For sales orders, specific BAdIs like SD_SLS_MODIFY_HEAD and SD_SLS_MODIFY_ITEM (as examples) enable modifications at the header and item levels before the order is saved. These enhancements allow businesses to tailor the system behavior according to their requirements.

For more details, refer to the SAP Help Portal under Business Add-Ins (BAdIs) for Sales Documents.

Best regards,

Patryk Walędziak

entry.title: Re: Both segments make-to-stock and planning without fina...
Re: 2H 2024 Release Highlights : SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Updates to Watch Out For
entry.content:
Hello,

I may have missed something. What is the schedule for 2H 2024 to be released into SuccessFactors LMS? I have the dates for 1H 2025. Any information would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: How to remove the transportation planning type in ewm...
entry.content:
Hi Raghavan,

I have encountered a similar issue while processing deliveries, where the Transportation Planning Type was incorrectly determined or not behaving as expected.

This typically happens when Control Keys are activated for the relevant Sales Area or Delivery Types within the TM integration settings. These control keys influence how deliveries are integrated with TM and can override or misroute planning logic if not configured appropriately.

Please verify and deactivate any Control Keys that may be inadvertently assigned. You can follow the path below to check and remove them:

SPRO Path: SIMG → Transportation Management → Integration → Logistics Integration → Internal TM Component Integration

Within this path, review the following configuration activities:

  • Control key assignment to Sales Organization
  • Control key assignment to Delivery Types

Make sure that only the intended control keys are active or remove them altogether if TM planning isn't required for those specific deliveries.
